executives.name: Adele Stratton
executives.background: Adele Stratton was appointed Chief Financial Officer and Head of Development in September 2018. She joined Iluka in 2011 and has held various senior roles in finance and corporate development. She is a qualified Chartered Accountant and holds a Bachelor of Commerce from the University of Western Australia.

executives.name: Alex Morrison
executives.background: Mr. Morrison is a CPA with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

executives.name: Jason Neal
executives.background: Mr. Neal was previously the President and CEO of TMAC Resources and Co-Head of Global Metals and Mining at BMO Capital Markets.
